text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the first day of the summer camp, a
period of intensive race training.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Can you hear them? The waves in the distance...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Not only is the sound relaxing, but the breeze
helps to escape the heat.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Those who conquer summer emerge victorious in
fall.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Our path to the Japan Cup has already begun...
I'll be relying on your guidance.
